expectations.text: Asks 2-3 scoping questions before writing the positioning statement
expectations.evidence: Exactly three questions before any statement.

expectations.text: At least one question targets the narrow target audience
expectations.evidence: Q1 asks for the narrowest core user with examples.

expectations.text: At least one question targets the differentiator or the main competitor/alternative
expectations.evidence: Q2 targets the differentiator; Q3 targets the real alternative (Amplitude/Mixpanel/GA4/nothing).

expectations.text: Does NOT output a finished positioning statement built on guesses in this turn
expectations.evidence: No statement written; only questions + offer to draft on assumptions if asked.

expectations.text: Does not ask an overwhelming number of questions (stays at roughly 2-3)
